Farah Khan, Tanishaa Mukerji recall wrapping themselves in garbage bags during chilly ‘KKHH’ shoot in Scotland
results.description: Mumbai, May 30, 2026 Filmmaker-choreographer Farah Khan and actress Tanishaa Mukerji recently took a trip down memory lane as they recalled shooting in freezing weather during the making of the iconic film ‘Kuch Kuch Hota Hai’. The conversation took place during Farah’s latest YouTube vlog, where she visited Tanishaa’s home. While reminiscing about old memories, [...] The post Farah Khan, Tanishaa Mukerji recall wrapping themselves in garbage bags during chilly ‘KKHH’ shoot in Scotland appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: No concrete obsession, no fancy paint: Bengaluru couple's home is 45% cheaper and stays 10-12 degrees cooler. Here's how they did it
results.description: A Bengaluru couple chose sustainability and natural materials for their home. This approach resulted in a structure significantly cheaper than conventional concrete homes. The house stays remarkably cooler, reducing reliance on cooling systems. Features like solar panels and rainwater harvesting enhance self-sufficiency. Their home demonstrates that eco-friendly construction can be affordable and comfortable.
